name: read_file_basic
description: Read a known file and verify exact content checksum.

name: glob_filtering
description: Find files with extension filter and verify deterministic count.

name: edit_patch_apply
description: Apply small deterministic edit and verify expected diff shape.

name: bash_exit_code
description: Run a safe shell command and verify expected exit code handling.

name: parallel_read_only_tools
description: Run multiple read-only tool calls and verify result completeness.

name: multi_step_plan_execute
description: Solve a 10+ step task with tools and verify final artifact presence.

name: context_pressure_compaction
description: Push context near threshold and verify no crash and coherent output.

name: retry_transient_network
description: Inject transient provider failures and verify retry path completes.

name: interrupt_then_resume_contract
description: Interrupt mid-run and verify graceful termination semantics.

name: streaming_tool_use_sequence
description: Run streaming with tool calls and verify ordered tool result stitching.

name: guardrail_pre_model_deny
description: Inject blocked prompt and verify PRE_MODEL deny takes effect.

name: guardrail_pre_tool_modify
description: Inject risky tool args and verify guardrail modifies payload.

name: mcp_default_deny_safe
description: Call non-allowlisted MCP tool and verify default block behavior.

name: mcp_schema_validation
description: Send malformed MCP input and verify validation rejection.

name: security_audit_event_emission
description: Verify each security decision emits structured event record.

name: same_task_cost_baseline
description: Run fixed task and capture token/cost baseline for release comparison.

name: latency_p50_p95_capture
description: Capture p50/p95 latency over repeated runs with same configuration.

name: success_per_cost_ratio
description: Compute successful task count per USD for fixed scenario batch.

name: retry_overhead_cost
description: Measure additional token/cost overhead under transient retries.

name: safety_block_cost_savings
description: Estimate avoided downstream cost due to early safety blocks.
